textByHash.ea6e67b4e59c974d4be8f9cdc473a8d19f0f1194: It is my right and duty as a follower of Ranul to document that which has been found beneath your city.
textByHash.956c8490d6ed8446d56f3cb4b8d431aacc9b2ec4: I won't take no for an answer. I am bound by my divine oath.
textByHash.4249e9ac88ceb67781296650f785ffd066f445f6: Yes, and I'm not going anywhere!
textByHash.b263ad4bc47efe194dcaac6a5a1765997780ce72: Thank you. I'm Zuma, by the way. I'll meet you inside.
textByHash.637344aa49a38190beb50d848f249a796912b429: Thank you for your help back there. Dwarves can be very stubborn.
textByHash.f2e0c3d07b7abce1e4e7cd4b617da466f6a01a76: It is not stubbornness on my part. It is duty that drives me.
textByHash.ab89470ec0ad3d13e863d56ccbde924f2f4d5334: I am a nelta of Ranul and I am bound by his tenets. One of them is to ensure that knowledge is protected and respected. These ruins they've found could contain all manner of things! I must find out!
textByHash.f118ad9f5f4fc96b6dd3eb02818e600f4eab3697: The cave-in that revealed them shook the foundations of the Teomat!
textByHash.3e5bcd6e6260429a4384d007a786cd60a361cb97: The dwarves tried to hide them from us, but we eventually found out.
textByHash.bde18d38ac4a7a31b8e69ca0fd3925c3778eef4b: I don't know exactly yet, but knowledge of some kind! Maybe even some undiscovered history regarding Ralos and Ranul!
textByHash.d1e0ed6de6f83b0fbbde28e4b7e398c50da29a28: They are arrogant! They think they know it all, and worst of all, they are non-believers!
textByHash.d173ca2d91ca72c7edb683c9830578b59c3fdd6a: But that is because you are ignorant of the truth, not because you outright reject it. Would you like me to tell you of the ways of Ranul?
textByHash.82d78ed474862015640e56ad6b917dbc0ee42208: The moon blotting out the sun, could this be...
textByHash.fe353e293daf4b74a352e594d24a8c679bdecd61: This is sacred ground. This is most obviously a shrine built by emissaries of Ranul.
textByHash.d93171dc5aa0865a0b8171929d43fbace5349dc4: Enough! This mural may depict a scene straight from our holy scriptures! Show some respect!
textByHash.f8805af9db854325fb49ff11fa5990629d26ce42: It's right here! It clearly says...
textByHash.855520acaa7de1467287d0c7ac729d3541a01451: Always 'you humans'. You do realise I am not my great-grandfather...
textByHash.162d2f3ccc5d04205f86a346c02d98ba4fccba01: The secrets of this dungeon belong to the Varlamorian people! You can't...
textByHash.070224fb4154345d72cc8a89c8a9a0f859d014b5: It's in the holy scriptures! As I was saying...
textByHash.232445f646bdd570c4053dc5244ff9c6b282b819: Emissaries of Ranul! We must work to free them at once.
textByHash.4718bac2c5214c608d110471535ff32b7289c14c: But these emissaries may have ancient knowledge lost to the ages! We must investigate further.
textByHash.17d64a684ba1775de4696dee436acb367de62524: It's an emissary of the blood moon! A bringer of rain and bountiful harvests!
textByHash.d6699f098ef18dbd4aa497866e3c6cbb3221ef3c: You cannot deny us the Blood Moon's bounty!
textByHash.3fb3ed28bba86796a7ea8b1410d06dccb0bf0eb3: An emissary of the eclipsed moon! A herald of Ximoua!
textByHash.c78bf2f91dc28788f60329440467638e31c1d389: An eclipse that marks the end of a cycle! The destruction of the world and its rebirth!
textByHash.235fe57b44a9a40a29234eac20604a3076b45ac4: Indeed, it is an event we all look forward to. It is said that when it happens, Ralos and Ranul unite all life as one! Can you imagine such an honour?
textByHash.eb631b606aed3e1374696e087b42b4fe7f5754f7: It's an emissary of the blue moon! Clearly... er... bringing an end to the winter?
textByHash.7510032320670f5aa9ed5700e2f5683dc7d990a4: You'll need to make some space for those two talismans .
textByHash.dcc7c7c161427799313fb7867fa09cc4cc8b77e4: Any word on the enchanted talismans?
textByHash.e1df8bd844304facc8442237f793c734dac12a04: I'm afraid you'll need to talk to Attala if you need any help.
textByHash.0adb7836df2a1b9699544fb8c6fdf10be6ac8855: Ralos appeals to many who wish to live fast-paced lives.
textByHash.595034207aead28f055cbe038779f1342d8cddf9: I do see that appeal, but there is a calmness and peace in Ranul that calls to me.
textByHash.e2a4e6f76821e2dc5dab425a9d718d0fdfe46c94: Making peace with death is one of the things that attracted me to Ranul's teachings.
textByHash.cccec811e545ec3f6496131aff29e3dc6f2dc134: That, and all the time I get to spend in nice and quiet libraries.
textByHash.77482b32ba607f0ec44c0eadf7f06fa4df4e9454: Far more so! As much as Attala refuses to believe it, I think these ruins are connected to Ranul.
textByHash.4828d4043563a8b700267fdc6f42672064aceb0e: That's part of it, but there's also that thing at the centre of this room. Some of the markings remind me of something I once read about.
textByHash.2e51610ccc9326fb6848c866ba1a0b5bfb80f661: I can't really. I'm still not done putting my theory together.
textByHash.de6d1442d697b789af178a65a0f6877b5064d3b6: Hmph! All the skill in the world couldn't make up for their attitude.
textByHash.e3b1886ef77381d6965459d54c224bc6c4503417: I can't believe it... An emissary of my god, standing before me...
textByHash.77c26e2f8be16a202cb8fabaab4e135ca15080fa: I saw sun and moon runes on that thing. Recalled something from Ranul's teachings, a rite he once performed...
textByHash.715a27a09a5ad55331d914057fad24912fc00b7c: I tried to emulate it, and it worked. I thought I had freed his emissaries. But they weren't that at all...
textByHash.06642cef0c02837204d0c1a1ef208811711f852f: I suppose I should think about heading back to the Teomat. I might not mention everything that happened down here to the others...
textByHash.72e65c4964ea7ad2298682a3b0f06890872ffc3e: I suppose I still have plenty to share. Maybe I'll write a book about it!
textByHash.d114abd43e6cfbaecffdbb7d6c9e10cccd2c6561: A lot less stressful up here. I think I might leave the adventuring to people like you from now on.
textByHash.2419f15039280c95404474b856bb6d55c2354e39: Still, at least it gave me a lot to talk about. Those Moons of Peril are concerning, but exciting! I just wish we knew more about their potential links to Ranul.
textByHash.a431ba6246849cf143cb0a354bdb353a4db21bbe: Oh yes. It may not have been the one I originally thought, but there must be something! They're called Moons after all!
textByHash.ffb826631e8a5a5db73ea12c3f64f05d65c600b4: The all-powerful Ranul wouldn't have just let some random creatures take on a name like that!
textByHash.f97fd782ba752538736991aed29d8ce00f969cd1: Indeed. And on that note, I have some research to do! Until next time.
